FragmentEntryLink.__html: A paragraph is a self-contained unit of a discourse in writing dealing with a particular point or idea. Paragraphs are usually an expected part of formal writing, used to organize longer prose.
FragmentEntryLink.__editableValues:
{"com.liferay.fragment.entry.processor.editable.EditableFragmentEntryProcessor":{"element-text":{"sv_SE":"Välkommen till Liferay","defaultValue":"
	A paragraph is a self-contained unit of a discourse in writing dealing with
	a particular point or idea. Paragraphs are usually an expected part of
	formal writing, used to organize longer prose.
","pt_BR":"Bem vindo ao Liferay","fr_FR":"Bienvenue à Liferay","ja_JP":"Liferayへようこそ","ca_ES":"Benvingut, benvinguda a Liferay","de_DE":"Willkommen bei Liferay","hu_HU":"Isten hozott a Liferay-nél!","ar_SA":"أهلا بكم في Liferay","fi_FI":"Liferay toivottaa tervetulleeksi","en_US":"Welcome to Liferay","es_ES":"Bienvenido a Liferay","zh_CN":"欢迎来到Liferay","config":{"mapperType":"link"},"nl_NL":"Welkom bij Liferay"}}}
